product.title: All That Jasmine Bath Bomb by LUSH

insights.statement: Strong jasmine scent that lingers for hours
evidence_quotes: It leaves my whole bathroom smelling of jasmine for hours after
Oh God, this bath bomb smells SO good!
It turns the water a pale green and the scent lingers for hours afterward
The color it turns your bath is very deep green, verging on blue

insights.statement: Entertaining to watch melt in water
evidence_quotes: I found it very entertaining to watch the candy flower melt in the water
The product is fun, lasting aroma, and high quality

insights.statement: Targeted at jasmine lovers and luxury bath enthusiasts
evidence_quotes: A definite must-have for jasmine lovers

insights.statement: Size may be overwhelming for smaller tubs
evidence_quotes: These bath bombs are wonderful. They can be a bit overwhelming if you have a smaller tub
To get your money's worth, I'd recommend breaking the ball up into smaller pieces

positioning.value_proposition: Luxurious jasmine-infused bath bomb with long-lasting fragrance and vibrant color transformation
positioning.target_audience: Floral scent enthusiasts seeking a sensory-rich bathing experience

messaging.primary_message: Experience the enchanting power of jasmine in every splash with our iconic bath bomb
supporting_messages: Transform your bath into a vibrant green oasis with our signature color change
Enjoy hours of jasmine fragrance that lingers long after you've finished bathing

channels.why: Visual appeal of color change and scent experience aligns with Instagram/YouTube content
content_ideas: Time-lapse videos of bath bomb melting
User-generated content showcasing jasmine fragrance longevity

channels.why: Targeted at fragrance and wellness influencers with loyal followings

offers.why: Leverages customer love for the scent and visual effects
Addresses concern about product size while emphasizing value

risks.risk: Potential size-related objections for smaller tubs
risks.mitigation: Offer smaller portion sizes in packaging options

kpis.measurement: Survey responses tracking fragrance intensity and color change
Customer data tracking return purchases of bath bombs

assumptions: Customer loyalty to LUSH brand remains strong
Jasmine scent is a universally appealing fragrance
Visual appeal of color change drives engagement
